name: Amaretto Custard Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease and flour a 12-cup bundt or angel food cake pan.
3. In a large bowl, beat all ingredients together on low speed for 1 minute, scraping the sides of the bowl constantly.
4. Increase the speed to medium and continue beating for an additional 2 minutes, scraping the bowl occasionally.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake in the preheated oven for 40-45 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Allow the cake to cool for 15 minutes before removing it from the pan.
7. For frosting or glaze, mix powdered sugar with milk or cream and liqueur to thin. Drizzle over the cooled cake.
(Note: While variations using chocolate cake mix, Kahlúa, Bailey's, melted chocolate chips, butter, and additional liquid are possible, they may alter the original flavor significantly.)
